title: Software Engineer Intern
description: Fullstack development role. Focused on UI/UX improvements, building responsive React components, and connecting frontend pages to the backend API. Built a secure SMS automation backend using OpenAI API to categorize lead responses, implementing sanitization to ensure data privacy.

title: Frontend Developer (Capstone)
description: Led frontend architecture and implementation for the senior capstone project. Designed and developed the user interface, strictly focusing on frontend development with no backend implementation, ensuring a seamless user experience and adherence to frontend best practices.

title: JITAI Dashboard Developer (Honors Thesis)
description: Developed a comprehensive dashboard for Just-In-Time Adaptive Interventions (JITAI). Focused on data visualization and user-friendly interfaces for behavioral data tracking.

title: Software Development Intern
description: Upgraded the AI finance assistant interface. Engineered semantic search with OpenAI embeddings and PGVector (PostgreSQL) to improve chatbot interactions.

title: Community Assistant
description: Provided direct assistance and support to over 80 residents with questions and concerns. Facilitated communication between management and residents to maintain harmony within the community.

title: Digital Design Teaching Assistant
description: Guided over 40 students weekly in building circuits and understanding digital design fundamentals, improving their technical skills and problem-solving abilities.

title: Retail Sales Associate
description: Utilized customer service skills and sales techniques, as well as product knowledge to connect customers with the right products.

title: Fast Food Team Member
description: Meeting and greeting customers, taking food and drink orders and preparing them, answering questions about the menu, policy and services while providing excellent customer service.
